notes: Dynamic DQLM MCMC; baseline uses shared defaults and VB warm start, with sigma-only warmup reserved for targeted retries.
Dynamic DQLM VB on p90 datasets; baseline starts from shared package defaults only.
Dynamic exDQLM MCMC; baseline uses shared light exAL MCMC warmup and explicit LDVB init, with theta/latent rescue held back for retries.
Dynamic exDQLM VB; baseline uses shared light exAL VB warmup without preloading STS rescue.
Static paper AL MCMC; baseline uses slice plus LDVB init and shared light exAL MCMC warmup.
Static paper AL VB; baseline uses shared light exAL VB warmup.
Static paper exAL MCMC; baseline uses slice plus LDVB init and shared light exAL MCMC warmup.
Static paper exAL VB; baseline uses shared light exAL VB warmup.
Static shrink rhs_ns AL MCMC; baseline uses automatic tau warmup, slice, LDVB init, and shared light exAL MCMC warmup.
Static shrink rhs_ns AL VB; baseline uses automatic tau warmup plus shared light exAL VB warmup.
Static shrink rhs_ns exAL MCMC; baseline uses automatic tau warmup, slice, LDVB init, and shared light exAL MCMC warmup.
Static shrink rhs_ns exAL VB; baseline uses automatic tau warmup plus shared light exAL VB warmup.
Static shrink ridge AL MCMC; same slice profile as the prior refreshed shrinkage relaunch.
Static shrink ridge AL VB; same long-budget baseline as refreshed288, without tau warmup.
Static shrink ridge exAL MCMC; baseline uses slice, LDVB init, and shared light exAL MCMC warmup.
Static shrink ridge exAL VB; baseline uses shared light exAL VB warmup.
